notableEvents.label: Jo Adell plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell hit by pitch. Jorge Soler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Logan O'Hoppe out at 2nd. Jose Siri out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Logan O'Hoppe out at 2nd. Jose Siri out at 1st.
